data.title: SC4: Create LLM eval for playwright-debug sub-agent CLI automation
data.description:
## Description
SC4 requires "a regression test dispatches a sub-agent without MCP access and confirms browser automation works via @playwright/cli." The current test (test-playwright-debug-cli-regression.sh) is structural only.

Create an LLM eval (evals/promptfooconfig.yaml entry) that:
1. Invokes the playwright-debug skill context without MCP tools configured
2. Asserts the agent uses @playwright/cli CLI commands for browser automation
3. Verifies the agent does NOT attempt to use browser_* MCP tools

This is an eval-based test, not a live Agent dispatch (which would require actual browser infrastructure).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Eval config exists for playwright-debug CLI regression
  Verify: grep -q "playwright.*cli.*regression\|playwright-debug.*cli" evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- [ ] Eval validates CLI-only automation without MCP
  Verify: grep -q "playwright/cli\|@playwright" evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
